iran_nuke.notes: Day 17 03:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IDF says 3+ more weeks of campaign ahead. 80% of Iran air defense destroyed could push nuclear hedging but no enrichment escalation yet. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). NEW: IDF tells CNN planning 'at least 3 more weeks' of Iran campaign — prolonged war signal (+5). Macron calls Pezeshkian demands 'immediate end' to Gulf attacks. 1,348 Iran civilian deaths confirmed at UN Security Council. No diplomatic track. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 90 (FALLING). Ceasefire talks expected 'in coming days' still dominant signal. Ground ops continue but diplomatic momentum building. Score drifts down 92→90 as talks advance without collapse. 90 (falling).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Trump NATO Hormuz ultimatum further strains alliance cohesion. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China Hormuz inaction. 90% of China oil transits Hormuz — major leverage point. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No new DPRK provocations. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week) still dominant signal. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday barrage confirmed. UK considering diverting interceptor drones to ME reducing Ukraine aid. Zaporizhzhia residential hit. Poland scrambled jets. 88 + 5 (Turkey coupling) = 93 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 17 04:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). NEW: NYT confirms 75+ Afghan civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes, 115,000 displaced (+4, refugee_crisis activated). Pakistan strikes military facilities in Kandahar overnight. Guardian: 99 total killed since conflict began. No ceasefire path. Score rises 99→100 (capped).

new: refugee_crisis activated — NYT: 75+ Afghan civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes, 115,000 displaced (UNHCR) — humanitarian crisis deepening (+4)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
MIXED SIGNALS (Day 17 04:00):
- ISRAEL-LEBANON: FALLING 92→90. Ceasefire talks remain on track 'in coming days.' First sustained de-escalation signal in 2+ weeks.
- IRAN: HARDENING. IDF plans 3+ more weeks campaign. FM rejects ceasefire. Trump rejects deal. Oil at $106/barrel. No diplomatic track.
- PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: RISING 99→100. NYT: 75+ civilian deaths, 115,000 displaced. Humanitarian crisis recognized internationally. No ceasefire path.
- RUSSIA-UKRAINE: 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. Zelensky accuses EU of 'blackmail.' Ukraine financial frontline struggling.
- NET: One de-escalation channel (Lebanon) vs three hot fronts (Iran, Pak-Afghan, Ukraine) worsening. Global score 85.
changed_signals.synagogue_note: US domestic: Michigan synagogue attack suspect's brother confirmed by IDF as Hezbollah commander killed in Israeli strike. Domestic blowback from ME conflict.

latest_news.headline: NYT: Pakistani airstrikes kill 75+ Afghan civilians, displace 115,000 — no ceasefire in sight
latest_news.text: NYT confirms at least 75 Afghan civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes since conflict began. UNHCR: 115,000 displaced in Afghanistan, 3,000 in Pakistan. Pakistan continues overnight strikes on Kandahar military facilities. No diplomatic track. 99+ total killed.

latest_news.headline: IDF says planning 'at least 3 more weeks' of Iran campaign — 'thousands of targets' remain
latest_news.text: IDF tells CNN it is planning at least three more weeks of its campaign against Iran with 'thousands of targets' remaining. No withdrawal timeline. Progressing to military industries and 'entire production chain.' Prolonged war posture confirmed.

latest_news.headline: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks 'in coming days' for durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament
latest_news.text: Two Israeli officials confirm Israel-Lebanon talks expected 'in the coming days' aimed at securing durable ceasefire that would see Hezbollah disarmed. First concrete ceasefire signal since war resumed Mar 2.

latest_news.headline: Oil tops $106/barrel as Strait of Hormuz remains closed — no end in sight
latest_news.text: Brent crude exceeds $106/barrel as markets see no end in sight to Hormuz closure. Trump seeks coalition to reopen strait. IRGC responds defiantly. Below $120 threshold but rising steadily.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM: 'We never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war'
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi: 'We have never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation. Ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Trump says Iran wants deal but US 'not ready.' Both sides rejecting diplomacy.

latest_news.headline: Afghan mortar kills 4 family members in Bajaur, Pakistan
latest_news.text: Mortar fired from Afghanistan destroyed a home in Bajaur, northwestern Pakistan, killing 4 members of same family and wounding 2. Cross-border civilian casualties escalating on both sides.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine — massive aerial bombardment continues
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 68 missiles and ~430 drones Saturday. 6 killed in Kyiv region. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion.

latest_news.headline: Dubai airport fuel tank fire contained — operations resuming
latest_news.text: Fire at Dubai airport fuel storage area contained. Operations gradually resuming. Previous Iranian drone strike on fuel tank had disrupted airport operations.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 85% (Day 17 04:00). DAY 17 CONTINUES: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): IDF plans '3 more weeks' campaign. FM rejects ceasefire. Oil $106+/bbl. 1,348 Iran civilian deaths at UN. No diplomatic track. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 90 (FALLING): Ceasefire talks on track for 'coming days' — durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament. Score drifts down. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 93 (RISING): 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. UK diverting resources to ME. Zelensky accuses EU of 'blackmail' on oil pipeline. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): NYT confirms 75+ Afghan civilian deaths, 115,000 displaced. Kandahar strikes continue. No ceasefire. (5) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (6) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55. (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks the only de-escalation channel. Pakistan-Afghanistan humanitarian crisis now internationally documented. Iran front hardening with 3+ week war plan.
